description: Create a content slide on AI as an enabler vs inhibitor for sustainable development goals using a two-column layout with a grouped vertical bar chart and a right-hand text sidebar.

header.headline: In terms of societal aspects under global sustainable development goals to 2030, AI is seen as more of an enabler than an inhibitor
header.sub: The role of AI as an enabler or inhibitor under sustainable development goals to 2030 along defined societal categories

items.text: Section navigation highlights Humans & Machines as chapter 3 within Technology & Innovation
